name: ktsu
description: Go repository for the Kimitsu agentic pipeline framework.

KTSU_API_KEY.title: KTSU API Key
KTSU_API_KEY.description: Orchestrator API key for bearer auth (automatically generated).

PORT.title: Port
PORT.description: The port the service will listen on.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.title: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Required for the default LLM Gateway setup.

KTSU_ORCHESTRATOR_PORT.title: Orchestrator Port
KTSU_ORCHESTRATOR_PORT.description: The port the orchestrator will listen on (automatically mapped to Railway's PORT).

KTSU_DB_PATH.title: Database Path
KTSU_DB_PATH.description: Path to the SQLite database file.
